attacks.finding: Blind candidate artifacts omit internal scores, activation weights, expected labels, ranking, and confidence.
Mode B/Mode C exact agreement was 0.9667.
Expected labels are used only after evaluator selection to compute validity.
Full candidate set false-composite rate was 0.3311.
Survives: the blind evaluator uses a deterministic observation-cue map.
Mode C selects from the score-free candidate set before expected labels are consulted.

invalidated_claims: Candidate generation itself is not doing the main work.
The blind evaluator is free of deterministic bias.
surviving_claims: Composite candidates remain useful after internal score removal.
Candidate ordering is not the dominant explanation.
The internal Proof 041 scoring formula is not required for Mode C selection.
